criteria.label: Artifact Validity
criteria.description: The output uses the expected webSPA JSON shape and complete file list.

criteria.label: Buildability
criteria.description: The project installs and builds with the declared framework and scripts.

criteria.label: Runtime Health
criteria.description: Preview loads without blank screens, broken assets, or console errors.

criteria.label: Responsive Layout
criteria.description: Core views work across mobile and desktop without overlap or clipping.

criteria.label: Workflow Fit
criteria.description: The first screen supports the user-requested workflow, not generic filler.

criteria.label: Publish Readiness
criteria.description: API, asset, routing, and dependency choices survive packaging and publish.
